item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
almost there
yeesh
refreshing
it’s good to have hobbies
oui
Jack on the set of The Shining? I honestly have no idea
mmm hmm
ultimate life hack
aren’t we all?
even if I remember it can be awful
dang
also me
I give up
finally
again?
wait what
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Bi/Pan Mini-Dump
item.description:
As promised, here's the bisexual mini-dump I planned to do. Generally bi and pan mean the same thing, right? I'd say just use whichever one you feel more comfortable with, or whichever flag color scheme you like more. I'm no expert on the subject though, if someone would like to correct me. I identify with both a little, but a more specific label fits me better.
I do love this color scheme, and somehow it got even better.
I love this one so much. Leanbeefpatty and F1nn5ter for those who aren't aware. It was someone posting this image here on Imgur that got me to look into F1nn and following him taught me so much about myself and it's been life changing honestly. That, and his adorable chaotic energy is a lot of fun anyway. His Coming Out video (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3reFDwM0yIA) where he comes out as Genderfluid (prefers he/him) and being on HRT, and being bisexual helped me so much. Inspired to come out of the closet a little more tonight, (am trans) but maybe not about the bisexuality, which if we get specific for me is probably fin(n)sexuality, lol.
I adore them so much. There's a "bisexual sitting meme" where bisexuals can't sit normally and I felt it so much, lol.
Maybe I need this.
I want this so much. "Equal opportunity sexiness" I believe?
I think someone made this because of the popularity of the reaction GIF. Surely there's another girl in Road to El Dorado for Chel to kiss though...?
I wonder if someone actually came out this way.
This was brought to my attention in one of my "Roommates Mini-Dumps", so ridiculously cute.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: Russian family values. Russia doesn’t treat its soldiers as humans.
item.description: Sergei came home on military leave, and his wife died. Now the Russian government sends him to the front and his daughter to an orphanage. Russian soldiers are subhumans to the state and have to kill until they get killed.

item.title: NASA finds humanity would totally fumble asteroid defense
item.description: In an exercise involving multiple US government agencies during April 2024, NASA conducted a so-called "tabletop" game in which participants plot their response to a 72 percent chance that an asteroid may hit Earth in 14 years. The results were sobering. Underpinning a bewildering number of moving parts is the likelihood that space agencies are not ready to implement the operations needed to find out more about the threat and mitigate it, even with more than a decade to prepare. "The process for making decisions about space missions in an asteroid threat scenario remains unclear. The process has not been adequately defined in the US or internationally" https://www.theregister.com/2024/06/21/nasa_asteroid_defence/ In the scenario... there is Washington DC as a good target Since we are in the 21st century, and with everything going on in the world, I wouldn't be surprised if there wasn't really asteroids out there that are growing tired of just flying about in space, and decided to go out with a bang, it's happened before, when will it happen again?
item.dc:creator: OregonComputerGuy

item.title: A few messages I saved over the years
item.description: If these messages helped you to lift your mood by 0.00000000000000001% - I'm happy :)
item.dc:creator: rebelft

item.title: another minidump of stolen things: sadness edition
item.description: Most viral?? This is the wildest thing. All these (some stupid, most not) helped me work with sadness that I didn't know how to deal with at the time. Seeing everyone's comments has honestly been really touching and I thank you all for taking the time! May we all find a little more peace today than we had yesterday
item.dc:creator: helloyoucrazykids

item.title: If you are feeling down, here is a WHOLESOME Saturday dump to lift you up : )
item.description:
1. Watching the tutorials on YouTube
2. Oh good you're awake
3. Life with a duck roommate
4. Burpees
5
6. A very grumpy dog
7
8
9. Let's sign him to the team, he will learn to love it
11. Kiss my ass
12. Deeply releigous countries: "Women shouldn't have jobs, to emotional and all that. Just stay at home"
13
14
15. If this dump helped uplift your mood, please consider checking out my passion project - I'm working on a wacky game, inspired by The Stanley Parable, with lots of humor and wholesome moments. Please wishlist on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you for your kindness!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Losing my wife is the single most devastating event that’s ever happened in my life! Grief can be so overwhelming and downright unpredictable. The emotional waves are endless as I miss my wife dearly! #grief #alonewithoutyou #griefjourney
